sections.sectionTitle: Pasian in Israel-te' Galte A Suksiat ding Ngetna

verses.text: Pasian aw, dai dide-in om kei in. Lungnuamin, tangloin ommawk kei in, Pasian aw
Bang hang hiam cih leh na galte in gamlumna piangsak uh a, nang hong mudahte kiphasak mahmah uh hi
Amaute in khem siamna tawh na mite thangsiah uh a, amaute in na it mite langpangin thu kikum uh hi
Amaute in, “Hong pai un, minam khat hihna panin amaute beisak ni. Israel min peuhmah kiphawksak nawn kei ni!” ci uh hi
Amaute in siatna ding geelin kithukhat uh a, nangmah hong langpangin thuciamna a bawl uh hi
Edom mite leh Ishmael mite, Moab leh Hagri mite
Gebal, Ammon, leh Amalek mite, Filistia leh Taia khua mite tawh thuciam a bawl uh hi
Assiria mite in zong amaute pawlpih uh a, amaute pen Lot' suanlekhakte-a' dingin pawl muan'huaite ahi uh hi
Endor munah a kizogawp, leilakah a luang uh a muatgawp, Midian mite' tungah na bawl bang leh, Kishon gun-a Sisera leh Jabin-te' tungah na bawl bangin amaute tungah bawl in
“Pasian' gam hoihte eima tan' dingin la ni,” a ci Oreb leh Zeeb-te bangin amau' miliante bawl in la, Zeba leh Zalmunna-te bangin amau a ukte khempeuh bawl in
Ka Pasian aw, amaute pen pingpei sunga ninnen, huih mai-a ansi leeng bangsak ta in
Mei in gamlak a haltum bang, mualliante a kuan'sak bangin
na khuapi huihpi tawh amaute delh in la, na huihpi tawh amaute lausak gawp in
Topa aw, amaute in na min hong zon'theihna dingin amaute khempeuh maizumna tawh kidimsak in
Amaute maizumin lungkia densak in la, a mindai-in siasak in
Topa a kici min nei nangmah bek leitung khempeuhah a Sangpenpa na hihna amaute theisak in.
